role: Brigadier General; Armed Forces Logistics Department (d. 2 March 2026)
bio: Hassan-Ali Tajik served as a Brigadier General in the Armed Forces Logistics Department. He was killed on 2 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave), in the same strike that also killed [Bahram Hosseini Motlagh](/people/bahram-hosseini-motlagh) and [Mohsen Darrebaghi](/people/mohsen-darrebaghi).

sources.title: Senior Armed Forces Officers Killed in March 2 Strike

editorial_notes: Killed 2 March 2026. Brigadier General, Armed Forces Logistics Department.
